tweet.text: RT @MileHighMoments: Happy Birthday to No. 5⃣9⃣ @MTR_90! The Denver Broncos signed OLB Malik Reed as an UDFA in 2019. Reed played very well…

RT @QuintonConaway: Let’s go @NevadaFootball! Let’s get this W!
Thank you @MTR_90 for sharing some words of wisdom with the team yesterday…
Grateful for the opportunity to come and talk with the guys, and enjoy a great team WIN in the process 🙏🏾 https://t.co/kAZgmb3Xxf
RT @MikeStefansson: You think Jeff Choate wanted this one? https://t.co/xkLTtR4VoW
